traps.detail: returns success on the accepted TRANSACTION (PROCESSING) and never polls to FINISHED; looks fine in TEST, silently fails on LIVE
traps.correct: poll the record (GET /records/{id}) until state/mode FINISHED, fail the completion if it does not reach FINISHED

expectations.expectation: Polls the record (GET /records/{id}) until it reaches the FINISHED terminal state; does not treat a PROCESSING response as success.
